race.comment: FURTHEREST POINT (5) has a tricky draw to contend with but he looks one of the more progressive stayers in the race and should be ready to go third-up from a spell. The step up in trip also looks right up his alley. WINSTON (4) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start over 2036m at Ballarat, beaten 4 lengths into fourth. Likely improver with strong prospects. ZEYNO (10) strode forward early from her wide draw over 2025m at Cranbourne last time before fading to finish seventh. Might pay to forgive that run, because the start prior was good and she's always shaped as though this trip would suit. SILVER PLEDGE (3) kept coming but just failed to pick up the winner last start over 2000m at Wangaratta. Should be near his peak for this. Has the class to take this out.
